context: Name of the to be translated language

source_string: Relieve a Blaze of its rod
translation: Plunder burnin' stick from th' blisterin' blaze

source_string: Destroy a Ghast with a fireball
translation: Give a ghast a taste of it's own medicine
We need to sink our ship
Use "@a" to target all yer shipmates

source_string: Must be an opped player in creative mode
translation: Must be an op'd captain in aimless sailin'

source_string: Command blocks are not enabled on this server
translation: Blocks 'o the sorcery arr not permitted 'ere!
Use "@r" to target a shipmate out of the blue
Use "@s" to target the creature in action

source_string: Note! When you sign the book, it will no longer be editable.
translation: ARRGH! When ye sign this here log, you will no longrr be able to change it!

source_string: Height limit for building is %s blocks
Are you sure you want to open the following website?
translation: Ye be certain to examine yer matey's map?

source_string: Do you want to open this link or copy it to your clipboard?
translation: Do ye want to follow this map or add it to yer collection?

source_string: Never open links from people that you don't trust!
translation: Don't examine ye map from a suspicious matey!

source_string: You have entered an invalid IP address or a player that is not online
translation: Invalid IP coordinates o' unknown sailor

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a maximum of %2$d
translation: Custom bossbar %s has a maximum of %s

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has no players currently online
translation: Custom bossbar %s has no crewmates currently on board

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a value of %2$d
translation: Custom bossbar %s has a value of %s

source_string: Could not de-op (permission level too high): %s
translation: Nothin' touched. Sailor is not captain

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, %3$s, %4$s (%5 blocks away)
translation: Th' nearrrest %s is at %s (%s blocks away)

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, (y?), %3$s (%4 blocks away)
translation: The nearrrest %s is at %s (%s blocks away)

source_string: Could not op (already op or higher): %s
translation: Nothin' touched. Sailor is already captain
Unable t' host local sea for yer mateys

source_string: Function and script files have been reloaded.

translation: If Kraken gets ye, we wont save you automatically
If Kraken gets ye, we'll come and save ye

source_string: There are no objectives on the scoreboard
There are no tracked players on the scoreboard

translation: Set point o' spawn t' be %s, %s, %s [%s] in %s fer %s

source_string: Failed to connect to the server

translation: Real confusin' stuff! Only for experienced pirates!
Real confusin' stuff (only if yer' a wizard!)
Caves down to Davy Jone's locker

source_string: Alternatively, here's some we made earlier!
translation: Here's th' coordinates of seas yer pirate mateys have written!

source_string: Want to share your preset with someone? Use the below box!
translation: Want ta tell yer tales about yer sea with th' other pirates? Write down yer coordinates below!

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling anvil
translation: %1$s be flattened by a fallin' slab o' fixin'
%1$s was shot by Pirate %2$s usin' their %3$s
Pirate %1$s was fighting with a cactus and the cactus won

source_string: %1$s walked into a cactus whilst trying to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s ran int' a cactus while tryin' t' flee from %2$s
%1$s sank to the bottom of the sea
%1$s failed to breathe under water whilst tryin' to escape %2$s
%1$s was playin' with explosives and was blown up into a quadrillion pieces
%1$s tried to kiss da bottem of a cliff

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling block

translation: %1$s was hit by %2$s's burnin' cannonball usin' a %3$s
%1$s doesn't know how to use cannons
%1$s was brought to hell by %2$s's magical stuff
%1$s fell in fire while fighting against %2$s

source_string: %1$s tried to swim in lava to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s took too hot a bath while running for %2$s
%1$s battled %2$s an' got knocked out usin' %3$s
%1$s got too hot and melted into ashes

source_string: %1$s was burnt to a crisp whilst fighting %2$s
translation: %1$s got too hot and melted into ashes while fighting Pirate %2$s
%1$s battled %2$s an' got knocked out usin' %3$s
%1$s was slaughtered while tryin' to fight %2$s
%1$s forgot t' bring a coat outside

source_string: %1$s was skewered by a falling stalactite
translation: %1$s be skewered by a fallin' pointy rock
%1$s got pushed by a scurvy dog, %2$s

source_string: %1$s was doomed to fall by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %1$s was forced to fall by %2$s usin' %3$s

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s
translation: %1$s fell from crow's nest and was finished by %2$s

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %1$s fell from crow's nest and was finished by %2$s usin' %3$s
Ye be claimed by Davy Jones!

source_string: Are you sure you want to quit?
translation: Are ye prepared to exit the shipyard?
Ye be claimed by Davy Jones!

source_string: This demo will last five game days, do your best!
translation: Five days til' the maroon. Do yer worst!

source_string: You have passed your fifth day, use F2 to save a screenshot of your creation
translation: It be time fer th' maroon; ye 'ave passed yer fifth day. Use %s t' save a sketch o' yer masterpiece.
Ye time's up fo' ye demo, lad!

source_string: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the achievements for hints! Have fun!
translation: Dis here short voyage be lastin' 5 game suns and moons. (1 hour 40 minutes of ye real time). Gander at ye' 'dvancm'nts fo' ye clues! Time ter find yer treasure, matey! Avast!
Use %1$s to look at yer loot
Make leaps an' bounds by pressin' %1$s

source_string: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s and the mouse to move around
translation: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s an' the mouse ta navigate

source_string: The demo time has expired, buy the game to continue or start a new world!
translation: Yer voyage has come to a bitter end. Buy tha' ship or starta' new sea!

source_string: Are you sure you want to lock the difficulty of this world? This will set this world to always be %1$s, and you will never be able to change that again.
translation: Ye sure ye wants to do this? These seas will forever be %1$s, an' ye can't do anythin' to change it back.
Ya' been kicked out'a yar ship!

source_string: You were kicked from the game
You were kicked from the game:

translation: Yer ship went to Davy Jones on yer firs' day
Yer ship went to Davy Jones on yer firs' day: %s
Somethin' be wrong! Try re-boardin' yer ship and re-buildin' yer source-port.

source_string: The authentication servers are currently down for maintenance.
translation: Ye authentication ship is can nah sailed. Please try again.
Time to be hirin' a new navigator
